Description: Mower taken into the fleet, visual check OK, hour-meter noted.

Description: Used vehicle accepted, minor stone chips in windshield.

Name: Visual check Q1/2026
Description: Door closes properly, lighting OK, floor dry.

Name: Season start 2026
Description: Pump back in service after winter shutdown, pressure OK.

Name: Mower deck won't raise
Description: Hydraulic lift on the deck does not respond. Likely a blocked hydraulic line.

Name: Seat switch bouncing
Description: Mower cuts out briefly when crossing bumps. Check seat contact.

Name: Uneven mowing result
Description: Streaks on the right — likely a blade is dull or the belt is loose.

Name: Stiff steering
Description: Steering wheel is hard to turn, especially at standstill. Steering head bearing?

Name: Pull cord jams
Description: Starter only turns over in jerks, the cord does not retract smoothly.

Name: Pump pressure too low
Description: Pressure in the irrigation system drops after a few minutes of operation. Check the filter.

Name: Pump won't start
Description: Motor hums, pump does not spin up. Capacitor likely defective. Sump pump removed, in storage.

Name: Rear brakes squeal
Description: Loud squeal especially in wet weather. Replace brake pads.

Name: Tailgate does not close cleanly
Description: Tailgate jams when closing, only locks under firm pressure.

Name: Loose trailer plug
Description: 7-pin plug is wobbly, trailer indicators cut out intermittently.

Name: A/C doesn't cool
Description: Likely lost refrigerant, brief hissing on activation.

Name: Right rear light defective
Description: Glass cracked, bulb loose in socket.

Name: Loading ramp warped
Description: Left ramp will not latch without using a pry bar.

Name: Chain tension won't hold
Description: Tensioning screw no longer grips, chain slackens during use.

Name: Battery runtime significantly shorter
Description: Battery only lasts about 15 min under load (previously 40 min). Check warranty case.

Name: Blades dull
Description: Cut quality frayed, blades need sharpening or replacement.

Name: Bearing noise
Description: Squealing at start-up, check bearings.

Name: Earth clamp defective
Description: Earth cable clamp no longer closes properly, unstable arc.

Name: High-pressure hose porous
Description: Hose shows hairline cracks, leaks at full power. Order replacement.

Name: Door lock defective
Description: Door can only be secured with a padlock.

Name: Weak headlights at night
Description: Left low-beam very dim, check bulb or reflector. (Done, bulb replaced.)
